steps.title: Combine fractions on the right side
steps.content:
Start with the given equation: $$\frac{1}{q} = \frac{1}{p} + \frac{1}{r} + \frac{1}{s}$$
To combine the fractions on the right, use the common denominator $prs$:
$$\frac{1}{q} = \frac{rs}{prs} + \frac{ps}{prs} + \frac{pr}{prs} = \frac{rs + ps + pr}{prs}$$

steps.title: Invert both sides to solve for q
steps.content:
Taking the reciprocal of both sides: $$q = \frac{prs}{pr + ps + rs}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
